data.title: 国投白银LOF Announces Temporary Trading Suspension
data.description: 国投白银LOF has announced a temporary suspension of trading to protect investor interests. According to Jin10, the fund will halt trading from the market opening on April 24, 2026, until 10:30 AM. Trading will resume at 10:30 AM on the same day, while redemption services will continue as usual during the suspension. If the secondary market trading price premium does not effectively decrease on April 24, 2026, the fund reserves the right to apply to the Shenzhen Stock Exchange for measures such as intraday temporary suspension, extension of suspension time, or continuous suspension to warn the market of risks. Further details will be provided in subsequent announcements.

data.title: UK April CBI Industrial Price Expectation Balance Rises
data.description: The UK's April CBI Industrial Price Expectation Balance increased to 32, compared to the previous value of 12. According to Jin10, this data reflects the anticipated changes in industrial pricing within the UK market.

data.title: UK April CBI Industrial Orders Fall Short of Expectations
data.description: The UK's CBI Industrial Orders for April recorded a balance of -38, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the expected -34 and was a decline from the previous value of -27.

data.title: Public Companies Benefit While Index Fund Investors Face Challenges
data.description: Public companies are experiencing gains, while index fund investors are encountering difficulties. According to PANews, the current market dynamics have led to a situation where publicly traded companies are reaping benefits, whereas those investing in index funds are not seeing similar returns. This disparity highlights the varying outcomes for different types of investors in the current economic climate.

data.title: The deputy speaker of Iran's Islamic Parliament stated that any negotiations are prohibited until the United States acknowledges its defeat.
data.description: Haji Babae, deputy speaker of the Iranian Islamic Parliament, stated that any negotiations are prohibited until the United States acknowledges its defeat. (Jinshi)

data.title: Singapore Blocks Fake News Websites Posing as Local Media
data.description: Singapore has instructed Internet service providers to block access to six foreign-linked websites that were masquerading as local news outlets. Bloomberg posted on X that these sites were identified as spreading false information and misleading content under the guise of legitimate Singaporean news sources. The move is part of Singapore's ongoing efforts to combat misinformation and protect its citizens from deceptive online content. Authorities have emphasized the importance of maintaining the integrity of local media and ensuring that residents receive accurate and reliable news. This action reflects a broader initiative to safeguard the digital landscape against foreign interference and fake news.

data.title: GraniteShares Delays Launch of Eight Crypto ETFs to May 2026
data.description: GraniteShares has postponed the launch of eight cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs) originally scheduled for April 23, 2026, according to Foresight News. The new launch date is set for May 7, 2026. The amendment affects daily reset 3x leveraged long and short products for Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), and XRP. GraniteShares submitted the updated filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), indicating the delay in the rollout of these financial products.

data.title: A whale liquidated its entire position of 12,223 AAVE tokens, incurring a loss of approximately $514,000.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, address 0xE595 purchased a total of 12,223 AAVE tokens over the past 5 months, with a transaction amount of approximately $1.65 million and an average price of $135. Three hours ago, this address sold all of the aforementioned holdings at an average price of approximately $92, resulting in a loss of approximately $514,000.

data.title: AAVE Investor Sells Holdings at a Loss
data.description: An investor recently sold a significant amount of AAVE tokens, incurring a substantial loss. According to Odaily, the address 0xE595 had accumulated 12,223 AAVE tokens over the past five months, with a total purchase amount of approximately $1.65 million, averaging $135 per token. Three hours ago, the investor sold all holdings at an average price of around $92, resulting in a loss of approximately $514,000.

data.title: Market Anticipates Rate Hike from Bank of England
data.description: On April 23, the market has increased its bets on the Bank of England raising interest rates. According to BlockBeats, expectations are set for a 62 basis point hike this year.

data.title: Binance Wallet Introduces Private Key Bulk Import Feature
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X the launch of a new feature allowing users to manage multiple wallets more efficiently through Private Key Bulk Import on the Binance Wallet Extension. This update enables users to import multiple private keys simultaneously with a single paste, streamlining the process significantly.

To utilize this feature, users must first log in to the Binance Wallet Extension. Once logged in, they should navigate to 'My Wallet' and select 'Add Wallet.' From there, users can choose 'Import private key wallet' and then opt for 'Bulk import private key.' This process allows for the quick and easy importation of multiple private keys, enhancing the user experience by reducing the time and effort required to manage multiple wallets.

It is important for users to ensure their wallet extension is updated to version 1.13.0 or above to access this new functionality. The update is designed to improve the efficiency of wallet management, providing users with a more streamlined approach to handling their digital assets. This development reflects Binance Wallet's ongoing commitment to enhancing user experience and functionality within its platform.

data.title: Ju.com launched its new product matrix, Hyper Trade. Within 24 hours of its launch, Hyper Trade saw over 10,000 participants and more than 200,000 orders.
data.description: On April 23, Ju.com released data for the first day of its new product matrix, Hyper Trade. Within 24 hours of its launch, the series of products had accumulated over 10,000 participants and more than 200,000 orders. Among them, "Bounty Battle," "Fingertip Trading," and "Fun BTC" were the most popular products. The official statement indicated that Hyper Trade's low barrier to entry and high transparency attract users to participate in the lightweight market prediction field.

data.title: UK Bitcoin Accumulator Faces Pressure to Liquidate Holdings
data.description: Shareholders of a UK-based Bitcoin accumulator are urging the company to sell all its cryptocurrency holdings and cease operations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing pressure from investors who are concerned about the current market conditions and the future prospects of the cryptocurrency sector. The shareholders believe that liquidating the Bitcoin assets could be a prudent move given the volatility and uncertainties surrounding the digital currency market. This development reflects a broader trend of caution among investors in the cryptocurrency space, as they navigate the challenges posed by fluctuating prices and regulatory changes.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Evaluation of Three Image Generation Models
data.description: Three image generation models were tested across various dimensions. According to PANews, the evaluation included interesting prompts for generating images. The models were assessed for their performance and capabilities in producing visual content. The results provide insights into the strengths and weaknesses of each model in handling different types of image generation tasks.

data.title: Baidu to Hold Board Meeting for Q1 2026 Results Approval
data.description: Baidu has announced that it will hold a board meeting on May 18, 2026, to approve its unaudited financial results for the three months ending March 31, 2026. According to Jin10, the meeting will focus on reviewing and announcing the company's performance for the first quarter of the year.

data.title: GoPlus AI Launches AgentGuard Checkup to Enhance AI Security
data.description:
GoPlus AI has officially launched the Checkup feature for its AgentGuard security component, aiming to address security blind spots in AI agents' autonomous decision-making and asset control. According to Foresight News, this feature elevates AI agent security from fragmented interception to systematic measurement.

The Checkup function establishes a six-dimensional evaluation system covering code, keys, runtime, Web3, configuration, and trust chains. It provides developers with a visual health report, complete with Tier ratings and repair suggestions, within 30 seconds.

Additionally, Checkup has strengthened Web3 defense rules by incorporating built-in wallet drainer and unlimited authorization detection, setting stringent security compliance standards for AI agents involved in financial asset flows. The GoPlus team emphasized that "trust is the cornerstone of large-scale commercial use of AI agents," and Checkup aims to establish a trust foundation in the AI era through a quantifiable and visual health check mechanism, ensuring each agent is certified for operation.

data.title: South Korea's Financial Services Commission Rejects KIDI's Expansion Proposal
data.description: South Korea's Financial Services Commission has declined KIDI's proposal to venture into digital asset and AI sectors. According to NS3.AI, KIDI submitted an amendment request on February 9, aiming to issue educational tokens and establish an AI subsidiary. The commission's decision reflects concerns that such expansion might be premature in the absence of a foundational digital asset law.

data.title: Britain's Private Sector Rebounds After Iran Conflict Slowdown
data.description: Britain's private sector has swiftly recovered from the recent slowdown attributed to the Iran war, according to a closely monitored survey. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the resilience of the sector amid geopolitical tensions. The survey indicates a positive turnaround, suggesting that businesses have adapted to the challenges posed by the conflict. Analysts are optimistic about the sector's continued growth, despite ongoing uncertainties in the global landscape. The report underscores the importance of strategic planning and adaptability in navigating complex international situations.

data.title: RootData Urges Web3 Projects to Enhance Transparency
data.description:
RootData, a Web3 asset data platform, has issued a transparency alert on Twitter (X), highlighting missing information from projects such as Mars Protocol, Anvil, Lynex, AstridDAO, and Hatom Labs. According to ChainCatcher, the platform noted the absence of team details, key calendar events, and token data, urging these projects to submit or update their information on RootData to improve their transparency scores.

RootData's transparency score is designed to assess the completeness and timeliness of a project's information disclosure. The scoring system ranges from A to F, with lower scores indicating less comprehensive information disclosure and higher risk of misconduct. Investors are advised to exercise caution with projects that have lower transparency scores.
